free_options.name: IRS Direct File
free_options.eligibility: Available in participating states, W-2 income, standard deduction, limited credits
free_options.state_included: Links to state free file where available
free_options.notes: Run by IRS directly. Simplest option if eligible. Check participating states each year.

free_options.name: IRS Free File (Guided)
free_options.eligibility: AGI <= $84,000 (2025 tax year -- check annually as threshold changes)
free_options.state_included: Varies by provider -- some include free state
free_options.notes: Multiple partner providers. Some also do state for free. Use the IRS Free File tool to find the right provider.

free_options.name: Free File Fillable Forms
free_options.forms_supported: All federal forms -- electronic versions of paper forms
free_options.notes: No built-in guidance, but this skill provides all the guidance needed. Good combo: use this skill to compute values, then enter them in Fillable Forms to e-file.

free_options.name: VITA (Volunteer Income Tax Assistance)
free_options.eligibility: Income <= $67,000, persons with disabilities, limited English speakers
free_options.notes: Free in-person help from IRS-certified volunteers. Search 'VITA near me' or call 1-800-906-9887.

free_options.name: TCE (Tax Counseling for the Elderly)
free_options.forms_supported: Common forms, specializes in retirement/pension issues
free_options.notes: Free for seniors. Often at libraries and community centers.

free_options.name: Paper Filing (Mail)
free_options.notes: Always free. Print, sign, and mail. Slowest refund (6-8 weeks vs 21 days for e-file). Mail address depends on state and whether payment is included.

paid_options.name: TurboTax
paid_options.notes: Only mention if user asks. Free tier is very limited.

paid_options.name: H&R Block
paid_options.notes: Only mention if user asks. Free tier exists but limited.

paid_options.name: CPA / Tax Professional
paid_options.notes: Recommend for: AMT, foreign income, business with employees, trust/estate, IRS audit, complex multi-state

state_free_filing_examples._note: State researcher agent should find the specific portal for the user's state. These are examples only.
